flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Florida Atlantic University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Florida Atlantic University rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (37.4% → 49.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Florida Atlantic University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (55.5% → 62.6%).
